metadata.title: Information Governance - Request Object
metadata.description: Schema for formulating an Information Request linking to a valid data sharing context.

entities.name: Request
entities.description: A structured assertion linking a requested action to a data sharing context.

fields.name: Identifier
fields.description: Unique identifier of the request. Used for logging and auditing. Autofilled.

children.name: value
children.description: The single unique identifier attached to the request.

children.name: System
children.description: System that the identifier adheres to.

fields.name: DateStamp
fields.description: DateTime of request (ISO8601 YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss). Used for logging and auditing. Autofilled.

fields.name: RequesterIdentifier
fields.description: The verifiable identity of the party making the request. Used for authorisation check. Autofilled.

children.name: value
children.description: The single unique identifier of the requester. Autofilled.

children.name: system
children.description: System that the identifier adheres to. Autofilled.

fields.name: RequestedData
fields.description: Object that contain the query parameters of the request. User choice.

children.name: Query
children.description: The identifying record of the Person the requester would like information from respondents about. Conforms to the Person (identification) standard.

fields.name: AssertedPurpose
fields.description: The reason for the request, using the same vocabulary as SharingPolicy. Constraint Check: Ensures the purpose aligns with the permitted purpose in the policy. User choice.

fields.name: SharingPolicy
fields.description: One or more data sharing policies the request is made under the aegis of. Context Check. Autofilled based on user choice.
